component.name: EVE Switcher
component.summary: Keyboard-driven window switcher for EVE Online

description.p: EVE Switcher is a fast, keyboard-driven window switcher designed specifically for EVE Online players running multiple clients on Linux. Use configurable global hotkeys to instantly cycle between your characters without clicking or Alt-Tabbing.

ul.li: Global hotkeys work from inside EVE - no clicking required
Multiple cycle groups to organize characters by activity
Automatic character discovery - new characters are added to configured groups
Separate hotkeys for character selection screens
Persistent configuration - character order is saved
System tray integration with quick access menu
Quick toggle to temporarily disable hotkeys without closing the app
